search_query: definition of a unit in retrieval systems
combined_text: system unit "system unit Also found in: Wikipedia .system unit [ ′sis·təm ‚yü·nət] (computer science)An individual card, section of tape, or the like, which is manipulated during operation of thesystem; class 1 systems have one unit per document; class 2 systems have one unit pervocabulary term or concept.case
